dashboard.label: Herbalife Akamai Website Health (Simplified)
dashboard.description: Error-focused view: availability, error rate, regional impact, and 4xx/5xx breakdown for the top 100 hosts.

search.query: index="akamai_metrics_prod" | spath input=_raw | spath input=_raw path=reqHost output=raw_reqHost | spath input=_raw path=country output=raw_country | spath input=_raw path=statusCode output=raw_statusCode | rex field=_raw "\"statusCode\":\"?(?<rex_statusCode>\d+)\"?" | eval reqHost=coalesce(reqHost, raw_reqHost), country=coalesce(country, raw_country), status_code=coalesce(mvindex(statusCode,0), mvindex(raw_statusCode,0), rex_statusCode), statusCode=status_code | eval status=tonumber(status_code) | eval status_class=case( status=0, "no_response", status>=200 AND status<300, "2xx", status>=300 AND status<400, "3xx", status>=400 AND status<500, "4xx", status>=500 AND status<600, "5xx", true(), "unknown" ) | eval is_2xx=if(status>=200 AND status<300,1,0), is_3xx=if(status>=300 AND status<400,1,0), is_4xx=if(status>=400 AND status<500,1,0), is_5xx=if(status>=500 AND status<600,1,0), is_no_response=if(status=0,1,0), is_error=if(status>=500 OR status=0,1,0) | fillnull value="-" reqHost reqPath country state serverCountry billingRegion statusCode status_code

index="akamai_metrics_prod" | spath input=_raw | spath input=_raw path=statusCode output=raw_statusCode | rex field=_raw "\"statusCode\":\"?(?<rex_statusCode>\d+)\"?" | eval status_code=coalesce(mvindex(statusCode,0), mvindex(raw_statusCode,0), rex_statusCode), status=tonumber(status_code) | eval is_error=if(status>=500 OR status=0,1,0) | stats count as requests sum(is_error) as errors | eval availability=round(((requests-errors)/requests)*100,3) | fields availability

index="akamai_metrics_prod" | spath input=_raw | spath input=_raw path=statusCode output=raw_statusCode | rex field=_raw "\"statusCode\":\"?(?<rex_statusCode>\d+)\"?" | eval status_code=coalesce(mvindex(statusCode,0), mvindex(raw_statusCode,0), rex_statusCode), status=tonumber(status_code) | eval is_error=if(status>=500 OR status=0,1,0) | stats count as requests sum(is_error) as errors | eval error_rate=round((errors/requests)*100,5) | fields error_rate

index="akamai_metrics_prod" | spath input=_raw | spath input=_raw path=statusCode output=raw_statusCode | rex field=_raw "\"statusCode\":\"?(?<rex_statusCode>\d+)\"?" | eval status_code=coalesce(mvindex(statusCode,0), mvindex(raw_statusCode,0), rex_statusCode), status=tonumber(status_code) | eval is_4xx=if(status>=400 AND status<500,1,0), is_5xx=if(status>=500 AND status<600,1,0) | timechart span=5m sum(is_4xx) as 4xx sum(is_5xx) as 5xx

index="akamai_metrics_prod" | spath input=_raw | spath input=_raw path=country output=raw_country | spath input=_raw path=statusCode output=raw_statusCode | rex field=_raw "\"statusCode\":\"?(?<rex_statusCode>\d+)\"?" | eval country=coalesce(country, raw_country), status_code=coalesce(mvindex(statusCode,0), mvindex(raw_statusCode,0), rex_statusCode), status=tonumber(status_code) | eval is_4xx=if(status>=400 AND status<500,1,0), is_5xx=if(status>=500 AND status<600,1,0), is_no_response=if(status=0,1,0) | fillnull value="-" country | stats count as requests sum(is_4xx) as errors_4xx sum(is_5xx) as errors_5xx sum(is_no_response) as no_response by country | eval errors=errors_4xx+errors_5xx+no_response | where requests >= 100 AND errors > 0 | eval error_rate=round((errors/requests)*100,3) | eval country_name=case( country=="AD","Andorra", country=="AE","United Arab Emirates", country=="AF","Afghanistan", country=="AG","Antigua and Barbuda", country=="AL","Albania", country=="AM","Armenia", country=="AO","Angola", country=="AR","Argentina", country=="AT","Austria", country=="AU","Australia", country=="AZ","Azerbaijan", country=="BA","Bosnia and Herzegovina", country=="BB","Barbados", country=="BD","Bangladesh", country=="BE","Belgium", country=="BF","Burkina Faso", country=="BG","Bulgaria", country=="BH","Bahrain", country=="BI","Burundi", country=="BJ","Benin", country=="BN","Brunei", country=="BO","Bolivia", country=="BR","Brazil", country=="BS","The Bahamas", country=="BT","Bhutan", country=="BW","Botswana", country=="BY","Belarus", country=="BZ","Belize", country=="CA","Canada", country=="CD","Democratic Republic of the Congo", country=="CF","Central African Republic", country=="CG","Republic of the Congo", country=="CH","Switzerland", country=="CI","Ivory Coast", country=="CL","Chile", country=="CM","Cameroon", country=="CN","China", country=="CO","Colombia", country=="CR","Costa Rica", country=="CU","Cuba", country=="CY","Cyprus", country=="CZ","Czech Republic", country=="DE","Germany", country=="DJ","Djibouti", country=="DK","Denmark", country=="DO","Dominican Republic", country=="DZ","Algeria", country=="EC","Ecuador", country=="EE","Estonia", country=="EG","Egypt", country=="ER","Eritrea", country=="ES","Spain", country=="ET","Ethiopia", country=="FI","Finland", country=="FJ","Fiji", country=="FR","France", country=="GA","Gabon", country=="GB","United Kingdom", country=="GE","Georgia", country=="GH","Ghana", country=="GL","Greenland", country=="GM","Gambia", country=="GN","Guinea", country=="GQ","Equatorial Guinea", country=="GR","Greece", country=="GT","Guatemala", country=="GW","Guinea-Bissau", country=="GY","Guyana", country=="HN","Honduras", country=="HR","Croatia", country=="HT","Haiti", country=="HU","Hungary", country=="ID","Indonesia", country=="IE","Ireland", country=="IL","Israel", country=="IN","India", country=="IQ","Iraq", country=="IR","Iran", country=="IS","Iceland", country=="IT","Italy", country=="JM","Jamaica", country=="JO","Jordan", country=="JP","Japan", country=="KE","Kenya", country=="KG","Kyrgyzstan", country=="KH","Cambodia", country=="KP","North Korea", country=="KR","South Korea", country=="KW","Kuwait", country=="KZ","Kazakhstan", country=="LA","Laos", country=="LB","Lebanon", country=="LK","Sri Lanka", country=="LR","Liberia", country=="LS","Lesotho", country=="LT","Lithuania", country=="LU","Luxembourg", country=="LV","Latvia", country=="LY","Libya", country=="MA","Morocco", country=="MD","Moldova", country=="ME","Montenegro", country=="MG","Madagascar", country=="MK","Macedonia", country=="ML","Mali", country=="MM","Myanmar", country=="MN","Mongolia", country=="MR","Mauritania", country=="MW","Malawi", country=="MX","Mexico", country=="MY","Malaysia", country=="MZ","Mozambique", country=="NA","Namibia", country=="NC","New Caledonia", country=="NE","Niger", country=="NG","Nigeria", country=="NI","Nicaragua", country=="NL","Netherlands", country=="NO","Norway", country=="NP","Nepal", country=="NZ","New Zealand", country=="OM","Oman", country=="PA","Panama", country=="PE","Peru", country=="PG","Papua New Guinea", country=="PH","Philippines", country=="PK","Pakistan", country=="PL","Poland", country=="PR","Puerto Rico", country=="PT","Portugal", country=="PY","Paraguay", country=="QA","Qatar", country=="RO","Romania", country=="RS","Republic of Serbia", country=="RU","Russia", country=="RW","Rwanda", country=="SA","Saudi Arabia", country=="SB","Solomon Islands", country=="SD","Sudan", country=="SE","Sweden", country=="SI","Slovenia", country=="SK","Slovakia", country=="SL","Sierra Leone", country=="SN","Senegal", country=="SO","Somalia", country=="SR","Suriname", country=="SS","South Sudan", country=="SV","El Salvador", country=="SY","Syria", country=="SZ","Swaziland", country=="TD","Chad", country=="TG","Togo", country=="TH","Thailand", country=="TJ","Tajikistan", country=="TL","Timor-Leste", country=="TM","Turkmenistan", country=="TN","Tunisia", country=="TR","Turkey", country=="TT","Trinidad and Tobago", country=="TW","Taiwan", country=="TZ","United Republic of Tanzania", country=="UA","Ukraine", country=="UG","Uganda", country=="US","United States of America", country=="UY","Uruguay", country=="UZ","Uzbekistan", country=="VE","Venezuela", country=="VN","Vietnam", country=="VU","Vanuatu", country=="YE","Yemen", country=="ZA","South Africa", country=="ZM","Zambia", country=="ZW","Zimbabwe", true(), country) | fields country_name error_rate | geom geo_countries featureIdField="country_name"

| stats count as requests sum(is_4xx) as 4xx sum(is_5xx) as 5xx sum(is_no_response) as no_response by country | eval total_errors='4xx'+'5xx'+no_response | where total_errors > 0 | eval "error %"=round((total_errors/requests)*100,3) | table country requests "error %" 4xx 5xx | sort - requests | head 20

| stats count as requests sum(is_4xx) as 4xx sum(is_5xx) as 5xx sum(is_no_response) as no_response by reqHost | eval total_errors='4xx'+'5xx'+no_response | where total_errors > 0 | eval "error %"=round((total_errors/requests)*100,3) | table reqHost requests "error %" 4xx 5xx | sort - requests | head 20
